response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their experience is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric system design.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects like GISCollective and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No trace of technical leadership mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
